Pakistan's Dedicated Digital Reset Retreat

Register Your Interest
What is Qaraar

Simply put — we take
your phone away
for seven days.

No WhatsApp. No Instagram. No news. No notifications.

For seven days you live the way people lived before all of this — you wake up naturally, eat together, talk to real people, go outside, sleep when you are tired.

No agenda except meals and bedtime. Everything else is yours.

It sounds simple because it is. That is the point.

📞  You are never unreachable. Every guest has access to a landline and the Qaraar office is monitored around the clock. Your family can reach you any time it truly matters.

🌿  Clean Pakistani food. Fresh air. Natural surroundings. No WiFi.

📍  We are finalising our location in Pakistan. Register your interest and you will be the first to know when we open.

Why people come

Because something
feels different
these days.

Not bad. Just different.

The days are full but somehow feel empty. You are always connected but rarely feel present. You spend time with the people you love and somehow feel far away.

Nobody talks about it. But most people feel it.

Qaraar is for the ones who want to do something about it.

A day at Qaraar

No agenda.
Just your day.

You wake up before the world turns on its screens. Breakfast is eaten together — at a table, with conversation.

The rest of the day is yours. You choose how to spend it — outdoors, indoors, active or still. There is nothing telling you where to be or what to do.

In the evening people gather naturally. Kahwa is made. Conversations happen — real ones, the kind that go on longer than expected because nobody has anywhere else to be.

You sleep when your body asks you to. Not when your screen finally lets you go.

Seven days of this and you come back to yourself.

Who this is for

Is this
for you?

If you have read this far — probably yes.

Qaraar is for anyone who feels the phone has taken more than it has given. The student who cannot study. The parent who keeps checking their screen at dinner. The professional who cannot switch off. The creative who has stopped creating.

You do not need a diagnosis. You just need seven days.

There is a word in Urdu for what brought you here — Bayqaraar. Restless. Searching. Never quite arrived.

Qaraar is its opposite.

Take the
first step.

No payment. No commitment. Simply register your interest and we will be in touch personally.

Thank you. We will be in touch.

Your information is never shared. Ever.
